definition: A single consumer expectation in a Mock Contract: a request to match paired with the response the consumer depends on. Pact/BDCT terminology — it makes the artifact contract-bearing rather than shape-describing, since a real consumer's dependency on an interaction is what a contract verifies.
usage: The unit of the Mock Contract Protocol's interactions[]. Drives a mock (serve the response) and a drift-check (replay against the real provider).
